name: Quake Style App
description: Quake-style dropdown for any application (foot by default) on Wayland. A configurable hotkey drops the window from the top or bottom at a configurable size; it auto-hides on focus loss. Optional native tab bar backed by a private, isolated tmux server, a configurable window icon, and Dracula colors. All shortcuts are the extension's own (no system shortcuts touched) and everything is configurable in the extension Preferences.
